According to \[article-147642_5\], "the now infected and necrotic root canal system...allows for the growth and establishment of a mixed, predominantly anaerobic flora." Additionally, \[article-147642_17\] states that initial treatments tend to succeed more predictively than subsequent ones ("success rates decrease with endodontic retreatment").
